name: mise-en-space
description: Search Drive, fetch Gmail, act on documents — mise-en-place for knowledge work
long_description: Full Google Workspace MCP server: Drive search and file fetch (Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs, Office files, images), Gmail thread search and content extraction, and write operations (create, overwrite, draft, reply, archive, star, label). Content is extracted to clean markdown with comments, cues, and attachment handling.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Find files, emails, activity, or calendar events

tools.name: do
tools.description: Act on Workspace: create, move, rename, share, overwrite, draft, reply, archive, star, label
